# Summary

<!-- What does this PR change? Why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Frontend (React/TypeScript)
- [ ] Backend (FastAPI/Python)
- [ ] ML / training pipeline
- [ ] Docs / infrastructure

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`, `pytest server`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`npm run lint`, `ruff check server`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` files added
- [ ] Documentation updated where behavior changed
- [ ] Model or data changes are reflected in `docs/MODEL_CARD.md` / `docs/DATA_CARD.md`
